news.t: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
S&P Dow Jones Indices Wins ESG Investing's Best ESG Index Provider Award
ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom

holdings.infoBox: VSGX is an equity ETF with a total of 6648 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.36%, Samsung Electronics at 2.25%, ASML Holding at 1.78%, SK hynix at 1.53%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 0.94%.

overview.description: The Vanguard ESG International Stock ETF (VSGX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Global All Cap ex USA Choice index, a market-cap-weighted index of global ex-US companies screened for environmental, social, and corporate governance criteria. VSGX was launched on Sep 18, 2018 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE Global All Cap ex USA Choice Index

data.title: ETF Edge: SEC hearing on ESG and crypto
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani with Vettafi's Dave Nadig and DWS Group's Arne Noack, join 'Halftime Report' to discuss climate control and cryptocurrency ahead of the SEC hearings.

data.title: 7 ESG ETFs to Buy for Responsible Profits
data.text: Investors are rapidly moving toward investing with environmental, social and corporate-governance (ESG) qualities in mind.

data.title: S&P Dow Jones Indices Wins ESG Investing's Best ESG Index Provider Award
data.text: LONDON, Feb. 11, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI"), the world's leading index provider, today announced that it has won ESG Investing's Best ESG Index Provider Award for the secon...

data.title: EY CEO on defining common ESG metrics; Wirecard
data.text: More investors are pouring money into ESG funds.

data.title: ESG index funds hit $250 billion as pandemic accelerates impact investing boom
data.text: The number of sustainability-focused index funds, and investor assets in these funds, have doubled over the last three years, according to Morningstar, and Covid-19 added to interest.
